1.eng: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
1.tag: Nang pasimula ay nilikha ng Dios ang langit at ang lupa.

1.eng: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
1.tag: At ang lupa ay walang anyo at walang laman; at ang kadiliman ay sumasa ibabaw ng kalaliman; at ang Espiritu ng Dios ay sumasa ibabaw ng tubig.

1.eng: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
1.tag: At sinabi ng Dios Magkaroon ng liwanag; at nagkaroon ng liwanag.

1.eng: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
1.tag: At nakita ng Dios ang liwanag na mabuti, at inihiwalay ng Dios ang liwanag sa kadiliman.

1.eng: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And the evening and the morning were the first day.
1.tag: At tinawag ng Dios ang liwanag na Araw, at tinawag niya ang kadiliman na Gabi. At nagkahapon at nagkaumaga ang unang araw.

1.eng: And God said, Let there be a firmament in the midst of the waters, and let it divide the waters from the waters.
1.tag: At sinabi ng Dios, Magkaroon ng isang kalawakan sa gitna ng tubig, at mahiwalay ang tubig sa kapuwa tubig.

1.eng: And God made the firmament, and divided the waters which were under the firmament from the waters which were above the firmament: and it was so.
1.tag: At ginawa ng Dios ang kalawakan, at inihiwalay ang tubig na nasa ilalim ng kalawakan, sa tubig na nasa itaas ng kalawakan: at nagkagayon.

1.eng: And God called the firmament Heaven. And the evening and the morning were the second day.
1.tag: At tinawag ng Dios ang kalawakan na Langit. At nagkahapon at nagkaumaga ang ikalawang araw.

1.eng: And God said, Let the waters under the heaven be gathered together unto one place, and let the dry land appear: and it was so.
1.tag: At sinabi ng Dios, Mapisan ang tubig na nasa silong ng langit sa isang dako, at lumitaw ang katuyuan, at nagkagayon.

1.eng: And God called the dry land Earth; and the gathering together of the waters called he Seas: and God saw that it was good.
1.tag: At tinawag ng Dios ang katuyuan na Lupa, at ang kapisanan ng tubig ay tinawag niyang mga Dagat: at nakita ng Dios na mabuti.

1.eng: And God said, Let the earth bring forth grass, the herb yielding seed, and the fruit tree yielding fruit after his kind, whose seed is in itself, upon the earth: and it was so.
1.tag: At sinabi ng Dios, Sibulan ang lupa ng damo, pananim na nagkakabinhi, at punong kahoy na namumunga ayon sa kaniyang pagkakahoy, na taglay ang kaniyang binhi sa ibabaw ng lupa, at nagkagayon.

1.eng: And the earth brought forth grass, and herb yielding seed after his kind, and the tree yielding fruit, whose seed was in itself, after his kind: and God saw that it was good.
1.tag: At ang lupa ay sinibulan ng damo, pananim na nagkakabinhi, ayon sa kaniyang pagkapananim, at ng punong kahoy na namumunga, na taglay ang kaniyang binhi, ayon sa kaniyang pagkakahoy, at nakita ng Dios na mabuti.

1.eng: And the evening and the morning were the third day.
1.tag: At nagkahapon at nagkaumaga ang ikatlong araw.

1.eng: And God said, Let there be lights in the firmament of the heaven to divide the day from the night; and let them be for signs, and for seasons, and for days, and years:
1.tag: At sinabi ng Dios, Magkaroon ng mga tanglaw sa kalawakan ng langit upang maghiwalay ng araw sa gabi; at maging pinakatanda, at pinakabahagi ng panahon, ng mga araw at ng mga taon:

1.eng: And let them be for lights in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth: and it was so.
1.tag: At maging pinakatanglaw sa kalawakan ng langit, upang tumanglaw sa ibabaw ng lupa: at nagkagayon.

1.eng: And God made two great lights; the greater light to rule the day, and the lesser light to rule the night: he made the stars also.
1.tag: At nilikha ng Dios ang dalawang malaking tanglaw; ang malaking tanglaw ay upang magpuno sa araw, at ang maliit na tanglaw ay upang magpuno sa gabi: nilikha rin niya ang mga bituin.

1.eng: And God set them in the firmament of the heaven to give light upon the earth,
1.tag: At mga inilagay ng Dios sa kalawakan ng langit, upang tumanglaw sa ibabaw ng lupa,

1.eng: And to rule over the day and over the night, and to divide the light from the darkness: and God saw that it was good.
1.tag: At upang magpuno sa araw at sa gabi, at upang maghiwalay ng liwanag sa kadiliman: at nakita ng Dios na mabuti.

1.eng: And the evening and the morning were the fourth day.
1.tag: At nagkahapon at nagkaumaga ang ikaapat na araw.

1.eng: And God said, Let the waters bring forth abundantly the moving creature that hath life, and fowl that may fly above the earth in the open firmament of heaven.
1.tag: At sinabi ng Dios, Bukalan ng sagana ang tubig ng mga gumagalaw na kinapal na may buhay, at magsilipad ang mga ibon sa itaas ng lupa sa luwal na kalawakan ng himpapawid.

1.eng: And God created great whales, and every living creature that moveth, which the waters brought forth abundantly, after their kind, and every winged fowl after his kind: and God saw that it was good.
1.tag: At nilikha ng Dios ang malalaking hayop sa dagat, at ang bawa't may buhay na kinapal na gumagalaw, na ibinukal na sagana ng tubig, ayon sa kanikaniyang uri at ang lahat na may pakpak na ibon, ayon sa kanikaniyang uri: at nakita ng Dios na mabuti.

1.eng: And God blessed them, saying, Be fruitful, and multiply, and fill the waters in the seas, and let fowl multiply in the earth.
1.tag: At mga binasbasan ng Dios, na sinabi, Kayo'y magpalaanakin, at magpakarami, at inyong punuin ang tubig sa mga dagat, at magpakarami ang mga ibon sa lupa.

1.eng: And the evening and the morning were the fifth day.
1.tag: At nagkahapon at nagkaumaga ang ikalimang araw.

1.eng: And God said, Let the earth bring forth the living creature after his kind, cattle, and creeping thing, and beast of the earth after his kind: and it was so.
1.tag: At sinabi ng Dios, Bukalan ang lupa ng mga may buhay na kinapal, ayon sa kanikaniyang uri ng hayop at ng mga kinapal na umuusad, at ng mga ganid sa lupa, ayon sa kanikaniyang uri: at nagkagayon.

1.eng: And God made the beast of the earth after his kind, and cattle after their kind, and every thing that creepeth upon the earth after his kind: and God saw that it was good.
1.tag: At nilikha ng Dios ang ganid sa lupa ayon sa kaniyang uri, at ang hayop ayon sa kaniyang uri, at ang bawa't umuusad sa ibabaw ng lupa ayon sa kanikaniyang uri: at nakita ng Dios na mabuti.

1.eng: And God said, Let us make man in our image, after our likeness: and let them have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over the cattle, and over all the earth, and over every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth.
1.tag: At sinabi ng Dios, Lalangin natin ang tao sa ating larawan, ayon sa ating wangis: at magkaroon sila ng kapangyarihan sa mga isda sa dagat, at sa mga ibon sa himpapawid, at sa mga hayop, at sa buong lupa, at sa bawa't umuusad, na nagsisiusad sa ibabaw ng lupa.

1.eng: So God created man in his own image, in the image of God created he him; male and female created he them.
1.tag: At nilalang ng Dios ang tao ayon sa kaniyang sariling larawan, ayon sa larawan ng Dios siya nilalang; nilalang niya sila na lalake at babae.

1.eng: And God blessed them, and God said unto them, Be fruitful, and multiply, and replenish the earth, and subdue it: and have dominion over the fish of the sea, and over the fowl of the air, and over every living thing that moveth upon the earth.
1.tag: At sila'y binasbasan ng Dios, at sa kanila'y sinabi ng Dios, Kayo'y magpalaanakin, at magpakarami, at kalatan ninyo ang lupa, at inyong supilin; at magkaroon kayo ng kapangyarihan sa mga isda sa dagat, at sa mga ibon sa himpapawid, at sa bawa't hayop na gumagalaw sa ibabaw ng lupa.

1.eng: And God said, Behold, I have given you every herb bearing seed, which is upon the face of all the earth, and every tree, in the which is the fruit of a tree yielding seed; to you it shall be for meat.
1.tag: At sinabi ng Dios, Narito, ibinigay ko sa inyo ang bawa't pananim na nagkakabinhi, na nasa ibabaw ng balat ng lupa, at ang bawa't punong kahoy na may bunga ng punong kahoy na nagkakabinhi; sa inyo'y magiging pagkain:

1.eng: And to every beast of the earth, and to every fowl of the air, and to every thing that creepeth upon the earth, wherein there is life, I have given every green herb for meat: and it was so.
1.tag: At sa bawa't hayop sa lupa, at sa bawa't ibon sa himpapawid; at sa bawa't nagsisiusad sa ibabaw ng lupa na may buhay ay ibinigay ko ang lahat na pananim na sariwa na pinakapagkain; at nagkagayon.

1.eng: And God saw every thing that he had made, and, behold, it was very good. And the evening and the morning were the sixth day.
1.tag: At nakita ng Dios ang lahat ng kaniyang nilikha, at, narito, napakabuti. At nagkahapon at nagkaumaga ang ikaanim na araw.

2.eng: Thus the heavens and the earth were finished, and all the host of them.
2.tag: At nayari ang langit at ang lupa, at ang lahat na natatanaw sa mga iyon.

2.eng: And on the seventh day God ended his work which he had made; and he rested on the seventh day from all his work which he had made.
2.tag: At nang ikapitong araw ay nayari ng Dios ang kaniyang gawang ginawa; at nagpahinga ng ikapitong araw sa madlang gawa niyang ginawa.

2.eng: And God blessed the seventh day, and sanctified it: because that in it he had rested from all his work which God created and made.
2.tag: At binasbasan ng Dios ang ikapitong araw at kaniyang ipinangilin, sapagka't siyang ipinagpahinga ng Dios sa madlang gawang kaniyang nilikha at ginawa.

2.eng: These are the generations of the heavens and of the earth when they were created, in the day that the LORD God made the earth and the heavens,
2.tag: Ito ang pinangyarihan ng langit at ng lupa, nang likhain noong araw, na gawin ng Panginoong Dios ang lupa't langit.

2.eng: And every plant of the field before it was in the earth, and every herb of the field before it grew: for the LORD God had not caused it to rain upon the earth, and there was not a man to till the ground.
2.tag: At wala pa sa lupang kahoy sa parang, at wala pang anomang pananim na tumutubo sa parang: (sapagka't hindi pa pinauulanan ng Panginoong Dios ang lupa) at wala pang taong magbukid ng lupa,

2.eng: But there went up a mist from the earth, and watered the whole face of the ground.
2.tag: Nguni't may isang ulap na napaitaas buhat sa lupa at dinilig ang buong ibabaw ng lupa.

2.eng: And the LORD God formed man of the dust of the ground, and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life; and man became a living soul.
2.tag: At nilalang ng Panginoong Dios ang tao sa alabok ng lupa, at hiningahan ang kaniyang mga butas ng ilong ng hininga ng buhay; at ang tao ay naging kaluluwang may buhay.

2.eng: And the LORD God planted a garden eastward in Eden; and there he put the man whom he had formed.
2.tag: At naglagay ang Panginoong Dios ng isang halamanan sa Eden, sa dakong silanganan: at inilagay niya roon ang taong kaniyang nilalang.

2.eng: And out of the ground made the LORD God to grow every tree that is pleasant to the sight, and good for food; the tree of life also in the midst of the garden, and the tree of knowledge of good and evil.
2.tag: At pinatubo ng Panginoong Dios sa lupa ang lahat na punong kahoy na nakalulugod sa paningin, at mabubuting kanin; gayon din ang punong kahoy ng buhay sa gitna ng halamanan, at ang punong kahoy ng pagkakilala ng mabuti at masama.

2.eng: And a river went out of Eden to water the garden; and from thence it was parted, and became into four heads.
2.tag: At may isang ilog na lumabas sa Eden na dumilig sa halamanan; at mula roo'y nabahagi at nagapat na sanga.

2.eng: The name of the first is Pison: that is it which compasseth the whole land of Havilah, where there is gold;
2.tag: Ang pangalan ng una ay Pison: na siyang lumiligid sa buong lupain ng Havilah, na doo'y may ginto;

2.eng: And the gold of that land is good: there is bdellium and the onyx stone.
2.tag: At ang ginto sa lupang yao'y mabuti; mayroon din naman doong bedelio at batong onix.

2.eng: And the name of the second river is Gihon: the same is it that compasseth the whole land of Ethiopia.
2.tag: At ang pangalan ng ikalawang ilog ay Gihon; na siyang lumiligid sa buong lupain ng Cush.

2.eng: And the name of the third river is Hiddekel: that is it which goeth toward the east of Assyria. And the fourth river is Euphrates.
2.tag: At ang pangalan ng ikatlong ilog ay Hiddecel, na siyang umaagos sa tapat ng Asiria. At ang ikaapat na ilog ay ang Eufrates.

2.eng: And the LORD God took the man, and put him into the garden of Eden to dress it and to keep it.
2.tag: At kinuha ng Panginoong Dios ang lalake at inilagay sa halamanan ng Eden, upang kaniyang alagaan at ingatan.

2.eng: And the LORD God commanded the man, saying, Of every tree of the garden thou mayest freely eat:
2.tag: At iniutos ng Panginoong Dios sa lalake, na sinabi, Sa lahat ng punong kahoy sa halamanan ay makakakain ka na may kalayaan:

2.eng: But of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil, thou shalt not eat of it: for in the day that thou eatest thereof thou shalt surely die.
2.tag: Datapuwa't sa kahoy ng pagkakilala ng mabuti at masama ay huwag kang kakain; sapagka't sa araw na ikaw ay kumain niyaon ay walang pagsalang mamamatay ka.

2.eng: And the LORD God said, It is not good that the man should be alone; I will make him an help meet for him.
2.tag: At sinabi ng Panginoong Dios, Hindi mabuti na ang lalake ay magisa; siya'y ilalalang ko ng isang katulong niya.

2.eng: And out of the ground the LORD God formed every beast of the field, and every fowl of the air; and brought them unto Adam to see what he would call them: and whatsoever Adam called every living creature, that was the name thereof.
2.tag: At nilalang ng Panginoong Dios sa lupa ang lahat ng hayop sa parang at ang lahat ng ibon sa himpapawid; at pinagdadala sa lalake upang maalaman kung anong itatawag niya sa mga iyon: at ang bawa't itinawag ng lalake sa bawa't kinapal na may buhay ay yaon ang naging pangalan niyaon.

2.eng: And Adam gave names to all cattle, and to the fowl of the air, and to every beast of the field; but for Adam there was not found an help meet for him.
2.tag: At pinanganlan ng lalake ang lahat ng mga hayop, at ang mga ibon sa himpapawid, at ang bawa't ganid sa parang; datapuwa't sa lalake ay walang nasumpungang maging katulong niya.

2.eng: And the LORD God caused a deep sleep to fall upon Adam, and he slept: and he took one of his ribs, and closed up the flesh instead thereof;
2.tag: At hinulugan ng Panginoong Dios ng di kawasang himbing ang lalake, at siya'y natulog: at kinuha ang isa sa kaniyang mga tadyang at pinapaghilom ang laman sa dakong yaon:

2.eng: And the rib, which the LORD God had taken from man, made he a woman, and brought her unto the man.
2.tag: At ang tadyang na kinuha ng Panginoong Dios sa lalake ay ginawang isang babae, at ito'y dinala niya sa lalake.

2.eng: And Adam said, This is now bone of my bones, and flesh of my flesh: she shall be called Woman, because she was taken out of Man.
2.tag: At sinabi ng lalake, Ito nga'y buto ng aking mga buto at laman ng aking laman: siya'y tatawaging Babae, sapagka't sa Lalake siya kinuha.

2.eng: Therefore shall a man leave his father and his mother, and shall cleave unto his wife: and they shall be one flesh.
2.tag: Kaya't iiwan ng lalake ang kaniyang ama at ang kaniyang ina, at makikipisan sa kaniyang asawa: at sila'y magiging isang laman.

2.eng: And they were both naked, the man and his wife, and were not ashamed.
2.tag: At sila'y kapuwa hubad, ang lalake at ang kaniyang asawa, at sila'y hindi nagkakahiyaan.

3.eng: Now the serpent was more subtil than any beast of the field which the LORD God had made. And he said unto the woman, Yea, hath God said, Ye shall not eat of every tree of the garden?
3.tag: Ang ahas nga ay lalong tuso kay sa alin man sa mga hayop sa parang na nilikha ng Panginoong Dios. At sinabi niya sa babae, Tunay bang sinabi ng Dios, Huwag kayong kakain sa alin mang punong kahoy sa halamanan?

3.eng: And the woman said unto the serpent, We may eat of the fruit of the trees of the garden:
3.tag: At sinabi ng babae sa ahas, Sa bunga ng mga punong kahoy sa halamanan ay makakakain kami:

3.eng: But of the fruit of the tree which is in the midst of the garden, God hath said, Ye shall not eat of it, neither shall ye touch it, lest ye die.
3.tag: Datapuwa't sa bunga ng punong kahoy na nasa gitna ng halamanan ay sinabi ng Dios, Huwag kayong kakain niyaon, ni huwag ninyong hihipuin, baka kayo'y mamatay.

3.eng: And the serpent said unto the woman, Ye shall not surely die:
3.tag: At sinabi ng ahas sa babae, Tunay na hindi kayo mamamatay:

3.eng: For God doth know that in the day ye eat thereof, then your eyes shall be opened, and ye shall be as gods, knowing good and evil.
3.tag: Sapagka't talastas ng Dios na sa araw na kayo'y kumain niyaon ay madidilat nga ang inyong mga mata, at kayo'y magiging parang Dios, na nakakakilala ng mabuti at masama.

3.eng: And when the woman saw that the tree was good for food, and that it was pleasant to the eyes, and a tree to be desired to make one wise, she took of the fruit thereof, and did eat, and gave also unto her husband with her; and he did eat.
3.tag: At nang makita ng babae, na ang bunga ng punong kahoy ay mabuting kanin, at nakalulugod sa mga mata, at kahoy na mananasa upang magpapantas sa tao, ay pumitas siya ng bunga niyaon at kinain; at binigyan din niya ang kaniyang asawang kasama niya, at ito'y kumain.

3.eng: And the eyes of them both were opened, and they knew that they were naked; and they sewed fig leaves together, and made themselves aprons.
3.tag: At nadilat kapuwa ang kanilang mga mata, at kanilang nakilalang sila'y mga hubad; at sila'y tumahi ng mga dahon ng puno ng igos, at kanilang ginawang panapi.

3.eng: And they heard the voice of the LORD God walking in the garden in the cool of the day: and Adam and his wife hid themselves from the presence of the LORD God amongst the trees of the garden.
3.tag: At narinig nila ang tinig ng Panginoong Dios na lumalakad sa halamanan sa kulimlim ng araw: at nagtago ang lalake at ang kaniyang asawa sa harapan ng Panginoong Dios sa pagitan ng mga punong kahoy sa halamanan.

3.eng: And the LORD God called unto Adam, and said unto him, Where art thou?
3.tag: At tinawag ng Panginoong Dios ang lalake at sa kaniya'y sinabi, Saan ka naroon?

3.eng: And he said, I heard thy voice in the garden, and I was afraid, because I was naked; and I hid myself.
3.tag: At sinabi niya, Narinig ko ang iyong tinig sa halamanan, at ako'y natakot, sapagka't ako'y hubad; at ako'y nagtago.

3.eng: And he said, Who told thee that thou wast naked? Hast thou eaten of the tree, whereof I commanded thee that thou shouldest not eat?
3.tag: At sinabi niya, Sinong nagsabi sa iyong ikaw ay hubad? nakakain ka ba ng bunga ng punong kahoy, na iniutos ko sa iyong huwag mong kanin?

3.eng: And the man said, The woman whom thou gavest to be with me, she gave me of the tree, and I did eat.
3.tag: At sinabi ng lalake, Ang babaing ibinigay mong aking kasamahin, ay siyang nagbigay sa akin ng bunga ng punong kahoy at aking kinain.

3.eng: And the LORD God said unto the woman, What is this that thou hast done? And the woman said, The serpent beguiled me, and I did eat.
3.tag: At sinabi ng Panginoong Dios sa babae, Ano itong iyong ginawa? At sinabi ng babae, Dinaya ako ng ahas, at ako'y kumain.

3.eng: And the LORD God said unto the serpent, Because thou hast done this, thou art cursed above all cattle, and above every beast of the field; upon thy belly shalt thou go, and dust shalt thou eat all the days of thy life:
3.tag: At sinabi ng Panginoong Dios sa ahas, Sapagka't ginawa mo ito, ay sumpain ka ng higit sa lahat ng hayop, at ng higit sa bawa't ganid sa parang; ang iyong tiyan ang ilalakad mo, at alabok ang iyong kakanin sa lahat ng mga araw ng iyong buhay:

3.eng: And I will put enmity between thee and the woman, and between thy seed and her seed; it shall bruise thy head, and thou shalt bruise his heel.
3.tag: At papagaalitin ko ikaw at ang babae, at ang iyong binhi at ang kaniyang binhi: ito ang dudurog ng iyong ulo, at ikaw ang dudurog ng kaniyang sakong.

3.eng: Unto the woman he said, I will greatly multiply thy sorrow and thy conception; in sorrow thou shalt bring forth children; and thy desire shall be to thy husband, and he shall rule over thee.
3.tag: Sinabi niya sa babae, Pararamihin kong lubha ang iyong kalumbayan at ang iyong paglilihi; manganganak kang may kahirapan; at sa iyong asawa ay pahihinuhod ang iyong kalooban, at siya'y papapanginoon sa iyo.

3.eng: And unto Adam he said, Because thou hast hearkened unto the voice of thy wife, and hast eaten of the tree, of which I commanded thee, saying, Thou shalt not eat of it: cursed is the ground for thy sake; in sorrow shalt thou eat of it all the days of thy life;
3.tag: At kay Adam ay sinabi, Sapagka't iyong dininig ang tinig ng iyong asawa, at kumain ka ng bunga ng punong kahoy na aking iniutos sa iyo na sinabi, Huwag kang kakain niyaon; sumpain ang lupa dahil sa iyo; kakain ka sa kaniya sa pamamagitan ng iyong pagpapagal sa lahat ng mga araw ng iyong buhay;

3.eng: Thorns also and thistles shall it bring forth to thee; and thou shalt eat the herb of the field;
3.tag: Ang isisibol niyaon sa iyo ay mga tinik at mga dawag; at kakain ka ng pananim sa parang;

3.eng: In the sweat of thy face shalt thou eat bread, till thou return unto the ground; for out of it wast thou taken: for dust thou art , and unto dust shalt thou return.
3.tag: Sa pawis ng iyong mukha ay kakain ka ng tinapay, hanggang sa ikaw ay mauwi sa lupa; sapagka't diyan ka kinuha: sapagka't ikaw ay alabok at sa alabok ka uuwi.

3.eng: And Adam called his wife's name Eve; because she was the mother of all living.
3.tag: At tinawag na Eva ng lalake ang kaniyang asawa, sapagka't siya ang naging ina ng lahat ng mga nabubuhay.

3.eng: Unto Adam also and to his wife did the LORD God make coats of skins, and clothed them.
3.tag: At iginawa ng Panginoong Dios si Adam at ang kaniyang asawa ng mga kasuutang balat at sila'y dinamitan.

3.eng: And the LORD God said, Behold, the man is become as one of us, to know good and evil: and now, lest he put forth his hand, and take also of the tree of life, and eat, and live for ever:
3.tag: At sinabi ng Panginoong Dios, Narito't ang tao'y naging parang isa sa atin, na nakakakilala ng mabuti at ng masama; at baka ngayo'y iunat ang kaniyang kamay at pumitas naman ng bunga ng punong kahoy ng buhay, at kumain at mabuhay magpakailan man:

3.eng: Therefore the LORD God sent him forth from the garden of Eden, to till the ground from whence he was taken.
3.tag: Kaya pinalayas siya ng Panginoong Dios sa halamanan ng Eden, upang kaniyang bukirin ang lupaing pinagkunan sa kaniya.

3.eng: So he drove out the man; and he placed at the east of the garden of Eden Cherubims, and a flaming sword which turned every way, to keep the way of the tree of life.
3.tag: Ano pa't itinaboy ang lalake; at inilagay sa silanganan ng halamanan ng Eden ang mga Querubin at ang isang nagniningas na tabak na umiikot, upang ingatan ang daang patungo sa kahoy ng buhay.

4.eng: And Adam knew Eve his wife; and she conceived, and bare Cain, and said, I have gotten a man from the LORD.
4.tag: At nakilala ng lalake si Eva na kaniyang asawa; at siya'y naglihi at ipinanganak si Cain, at sinabi, Nagkaanak ako ng lalake sa tulong ng Panginoon.

4.eng: And she again bare his brother Abel. And Abel was a keeper of sheep, but Cain was a tiller of the ground.
4.tag: At sa muli ay ipinanganak ang kaniyang kapatid na si Abel. At si Abel ay tagapagalaga ng mga tupa; datapuwa't si Cain ay mangbubukid ng lupa.

4.eng: And in process of time it came to pass, that Cain brought of the fruit of the ground an offering unto the LORD.
4.tag: At nangyari nang lumalakad ang panahon ay nagdala si Cain ng isang handog na mga bunga ng lupa sa Panginoon.

4.eng: And Abel, he also brought of the firstlings of his flock and of the fat thereof. And the LORD had respect unto Abel and to his offering:
4.tag: At nagdala rin naman si Abel ng mga panganay ng kaniyang kawan at ng mga taba ng mga yaon. At nilingap ng Panginoon si Abel at ang kaniyang handog:

4.eng: But unto Cain and to his offering he had not respect. And Cain was very wroth, and his countenance fell.
4.tag: Datapuwa't hindi nilingap si Cain at ang kaniyang handog. At naginit na mainam si Cain, at namanglaw ang kaniyang mukha.

4.eng: And the LORD said unto Cain, Why art thou wroth? and why is thy countenance fallen?
4.tag: At sinabi ng Panginoon kay Cain, Bakit ka naginit? at bakit namanglaw ang iyong mukha?

4.eng: If thou doest well, shalt thou not be accepted? and if thou doest not well, sin lieth at the door. And unto thee shall be his desire, and thou shalt rule over him.
4.tag: Kung ikaw ay gumawa ng mabuti, di ba ikaw mamarapatin? at kung hindi ka gumawa ng mabuti, ay nahahandusay ang kasalanan sa pintuan: at sa iyo'y pahihinuhod ang kaniyang nasa, at ikaw ang papanginoonin niya.

4.eng: And Cain talked with Abel his brother: and it came to pass, when they were in the field, that Cain rose up against Abel his brother, and slew him.
4.tag: At yao'y sinabi ni Cain sa kaniyang kapatid na kay Abel. At nangyari, nang sila'y nasa parang ay nagtindig si Cain laban kay Abel na kaniyang kapatid, at siya'y kaniyang pinatay.

4.eng: And the LORD said unto Cain, Where is Abel thy brother? And he said, I know not: Am I my brother's keeper?
4.tag: At sinabi ng Panginoon kay Cain, Saan naroon si Abel na iyong kapatid? At sinabi niya, Aywan ko: ako ba'y tagapagbantay sa aking kapatid?

4.eng: And he said, What hast thou done? the voice of thy brother's blood crieth unto me from the ground.
4.tag: At sinabi niya, Anong iyong ginawa? ang tinig ng dugo ng iyong kapatid ay dumadaing sa akin mula sa lupa.

4.eng: And now art thou cursed from the earth, which hath opened her mouth to receive thy brother's blood from thy hand;
4.tag: At ngayo'y sinumpa ka sa lupa na siyang nagbuka ng bibig na tumanggap sa iyong kamay ng dugo ng iyong kapatid;

4.eng: When thou tillest the ground, it shall not henceforth yield unto thee her strength; a fugitive and a vagabond shalt thou be in the earth.
4.tag: Pagbubukid mo ng lupa, ay di na ibibigay mula ngayon sa iyo ang kaniyang lakas; ikaw ay magiging palaboy at hampas-lupa sa lupa.

4.eng: And Cain said unto the LORD, My punishment is greater than I can bear.
4.tag: At sinabi ni Cain sa Panginoon, Ang aking kaparusahan ay higit kaysa mababata ko.

4.eng: Behold, thou hast driven me out this day from the face of the earth; and from thy face shall I be hid; and I shall be a fugitive and a vagabond in the earth; and it shall come to pass, that every one that findeth me shall slay me.
4.tag: Narito, ako'y iyong itinataboy ngayon mula sa ibabaw ng lupa, at sa iyong harapan ay magtatago ako; at ako'y magiging palaboy at hampaslupa; at mangyayari, na sinomang makasumpong sa akin ay papatayin ako.

4.eng: And the LORD said unto him, Therefore whosoever slayeth Cain, vengeance shall be taken on him sevenfold. And the LORD set a mark upon Cain, lest any finding him should kill him.
4.tag: At sinabi sa kaniya ng Panginoon, Dahil dito'y sinomang pumatay kay Cain ay makapitong gagantihan. At nilagyan ng Panginoon ng isang tanda si Cain, baka siya'y sugatan ng sinomang makakasumpong sa kaniya.

4.eng: And Cain went out from the presence of the LORD, and dwelt in the land of Nod, on the east of Eden.
4.tag: At umalis si Cain sa harapan ng Panginoon at tumahan sa lupain ng Nod, sa silanganan ng Eden.

4.eng: And Cain knew his wife; and she conceived, and bare Enoch: and he builded a city, and called the name of the city, after the name of his son, Enoch.
4.tag: At nakilala ni Cain ang kaniyang asawa, at siya'y naglihi at ipinanganak si Enoc: at siya'y nagtayo ng isang bayan at tinawag ang bayan ayon sa pangalan ng kaniyang anak, Enoc.

4.eng: And unto Enoch was born Irad: and Irad begat Mehujael: and Mehujael begat Methusael: and Methusael begat Lamech.
4.tag: At naging anak ni Enoc si Irad; at naging anak ni Irad si Mehujael; at naging anak ni Mehujael si Metusael; at naging anak ni Metusael si Lamec.

4.eng: And Lamech took unto him two wives: the name of the one was Adah, and the name of the other Zillah.
4.tag: At si Lamec ay nagasawa ng dalawa; ang pangalan ng isa'y Ada, at ang pangalan ng ikalawa ay Zilla.

4.eng: And Adah bare Jabal: he was the father of such as dwell in tents, and of such as have cattle.
4.tag: At naging anak ni Ada si Jabal: na siyang naging magulang ng nangagsisitahan sa mga tolda at may mga hayop.

4.eng: And his brother's name was Jubal: he was the father of all such as handle the harp and organ.
4.tag: At ang pangalan ng kaniyang kapatid ay Jubal: na siyang naging magulang ng lahat na tumutugtog ng alpa at ng flauta.

4.eng: And Zillah, she also bare Tubalcain, an instructer of every artificer in brass and iron: and the sister of Tubalcain was Naamah.
4.tag: At tungkol kay Zilla, ay ipinanganak naman niya si Tubal-Cain na mamamanday ng lahat na kagamitang patalim na tanso at bakal: at ang kapatid na babae ni Tubal-Cain ay si Naama.

4.eng: And Lamech said unto his wives, Adah and Zillah, Hear my voice; ye wives of Lamech, hearken unto my speech: for I have slain a man to my wounding, and a young man to my hurt.
4.tag: At sinabi ni Lamec sa kaniyang mga asawa: Ada at Zilla pakinggan ninyo ang aking tinig: Kayong mga asawa ni Lamec ay makinig ng aking salaysay: Sapagka't pumatay ako ng isang tao, dahil sa ako'y sinugatan, At ng isang binata, dahil sa ako'y hinampas.

4.eng: If Cain shall be avenged sevenfold, truly Lamech seventy and sevenfold.
4.tag: Kung makapitong gagantihan si Cain, tunay na si Lamec ay makapitong pung pito.

4.eng: And Adam knew his wife again; and she bare a son, and called his name Seth: For God, said she , hath appointed me another seed instead of Abel, whom Cain slew.
4.tag: At nakilalang muli ni Adam ang kaniyang asawa; at nanganak ng isang lalake, at tinawag ang kaniyang pangalan na Set; sapagka't aniya'y binigyan ako ng Dios ng ibang anak na kahalili ni Abel; sapagka't siya'y pinatay ni Cain.

4.eng: And to Seth, to him also there was born a son; and he called his name Enos: then began men to call upon the name of the LORD.
4.tag: At nagkaanak naman si Set ng isang lalake; at tinawag ang kaniyang pangalan na Enos. Noon ay pinasimulan ng mga tao ang pagtawag sa pangalan ng Panginoon.

5.eng: This is the book of the generations of Adam. In the day that God created man, in the likeness of God made he him;
5.tag: Ito ang aklat ng mga lahi ni Adam. Nang araw na lalangin ng Dios ang tao, sa wangis ng Dios siya nilalang;

5.eng: Male and female created he them; and blessed them, and called their name Adam, in the day when they were created.
5.tag: Lalake at babae silang nilalang; at sila'y binasbasan, at tinawag na Adam ang kanilang pangalan, nang araw na sila'y lalangin.

5.eng: And Adam lived an hundred and thirty years, and begat a son in his own likeness, after his image; and called his name Seth:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Adam ng isang daan at tatlong pung taon, at nagkaanak ng isang lalaking kaniyang wangis na hawig sa kaniyang larawan; at tinawag ang kaniyang pangalan na Set:

5.eng: And the days of Adam after he had begotten Seth were eight hundred years: and he begat sons and daughters:
5.tag: At ang mga naging araw ni Adam, pagkatapos na maipanganak si Set, ay walong daang taon: at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae.

5.eng: And all the days that Adam lived were nine hundred and thirty years: and he died.
5.tag: At ang lahat na araw na ikinabuhay ni Adam ay siyam na raan at tatlong pung taon; at siya'y namatay.

5.eng: And Seth lived an hundred and five years, and begat Enos:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Set ng isang daan at limang taon at naging anak niya si Enos.

5.eng: And Seth lived after he begat Enos eight hundred and seven years, and begat sons and daughters:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Set pagkatapos na maipanganak si Enos ng walong daan at pitong taon; at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae:

5.eng: And all the days of Seth were nine hundred and twelve years: and he died.
5.tag: At ang lahat na naging araw ni Set ay siyam na raan at labing dalawang taon: at siya'y namatay.

5.eng: And Enos lived ninety years, and begat Cainan:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Enos ng siyam na pung taon, at naging anak si Cainan:

5.eng: And Enos lived after he begat Cainan eight hundred and fifteen years, and begat sons and daughters:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Enos, pagkatapos na maipanganak si Cainan, ng walong daan at labing limang taon; at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae:

5.eng: And all the days of Enos were nine hundred and five years: and he died.
5.tag: At ang lahat na naging araw ni Enos ay siyam na raan at limang taon, at siya'y namatay.

5.eng: And Cainan lived seventy years, and begat Mahalaleel:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Cainan ng pitong pung taon, at naging anak si Mahalaleel:

5.eng: And Cainan lived after he begat Mahalaleel eight hundred and forty years, and begat sons and daughters:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Cainan, pagkatapos na maipanganak si Mahalaleel, ng walong daan at apat na pung taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae:

5.eng: And all the days of Cainan were nine hundred and ten years: and he died.
5.tag: At ang lahat na naging araw ni Cainan, siyam na raan at sangpung taon, at namatay.

5.eng: And Mahalaleel lived sixty and five years, and begat Jared:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Mahalaleel ng anim na pu't limang taon, at naging anak si Jared:

5.eng: And Mahalaleel lived after he begat Jared eight hundred and thirty years, and begat sons and daughters:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Mahalaleel, pagkatapos na maipanganak si Jared, ng walong daan at tatlong pung taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae:

5.eng: And all the days of Mahalaleel were eight hundred ninety and five years: and he died.
5.tag: At ang lahat na naging araw ni Mahalaleel ay walong daan at siyam na pu't limang taon: at namatay.

5.eng: And Jared lived an hundred sixty and two years, and he begat Enoch:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Jared ng isang daan at anim na pu't dalawang taon, at naging anak si Enoc:

5.eng: And Jared lived after he begat Enoch eight hundred years, and begat sons and daughters:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Jared, pagkatapos na maipanganak si Enoc, ng walong daang taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae:

5.eng: And all the days of Jared were nine hundred sixty and two years: and he died.
5.tag: At ang lahat na naging araw ni Jared ay siyam na raan at anim na pu't dalawang taon: at namatay.

5.eng: And Enoch lived sixty and five years, and begat Methuselah:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Enoc na anim na pu't limang taon, at naging anak si Matusalem:

5.eng: And Enoch walked with God after he begat Methuselah three hundred years, and begat sons and daughters:
5.tag: At lumakad si Enoc na kasama ng Dios, pagkatapos na maipanganak si Matusalem na tatlong daang taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae:

5.eng: And all the days of Enoch were three hundred sixty and five years:
5.tag: At ang lahat na naging araw ni Enoc ay tatlong daan at anim na pu't limang taon:

5.eng: And Enoch walked with God: and he was not; for God took him.
5.tag: At lumakad si Enoc na kasama ng Dios: at di siya nasumpungan, sapagka't kinuha ng Dios.

5.eng: And Methuselah lived an hundred eighty and seven years, and begat Lamech:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Matusalem ng isang daan at walong pu't pitong taon; at naging anak si Lamec:

5.eng: And Methuselah lived after he begat Lamech seven hundred eighty and two years, and begat sons and daughters:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Matusalem pagkatapos na maipanganak si Lamec, ng pitong daan at walong pu't dalawang taon; at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae;

5.eng: And all the days of Methuselah were nine hundred sixty and nine years: and he died.
5.tag: At ang lahat na naging araw ni Matusalem ay siyam na raan at anim na pu't siyam na taon: at siya'y namatay.

5.eng: And Lamech lived an hundred eighty and two years, and begat a son:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Lamec ng isang daan at walong pu't dalawang taon, at nagkaanak ng isang lalake:

5.eng: And he called his name Noah, saying, This same shall comfort us concerning our work and toil of our hands, because of the ground which the LORD hath cursed.
5.tag: At tinawag ang kaniyang pangalan na Noe, na sinabi, Ito nga ang aaliw sa atin tungkol sa ating gawa at sa pinagpagalan ng ating mga kamay, dahil sa lupang sinumpa ng Panginoon.

5.eng: And Lamech lived after he begat Noah five hundred ninety and five years, and begat sons and daughters:
5.tag: At nabuhay si Lamec, pagkatapos na maipanganak si Noe, ng limang daan at siyam na pu't limang taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae:

5.eng: And all the days of Lamech were seven hundred seventy and seven years: and he died.
5.tag: At ang lahat na naging araw ni Lamec ay pitong daan at pitong pu't pitong taon: at namatay.

5.eng: And Noah was five hundred years old: and Noah begat Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
5.tag: At si Noe ay may limang daang taon: at naging anak ni Noe si Sem, si Cham, at si Japhet.

6.eng: And it came to pass, when men began to multiply on the face of the earth, and daughters were born unto them,
6.tag: At nangyari, nang magpasimula na dumami ang mga tao sa balat ng lupa, at mangagkaanak ng mga babae,

6.eng: That the sons of God saw the daughters of men that they were fair; and they took them wives of all which they chose.
6.tag: Na nakita ng mga anak ng Dios, na magaganda ang mga anak na babae ng mga tao; at sila'y nangagsikuha ng kanikaniyang asawa sa lahat ng kanilang pinili.

6.eng: And the LORD said, My spirit shall not always strive with man, for that he also is flesh: yet his days shall be an hundred and twenty years.
6.tag: At sinabi ng Panginoon, Ang aking Espiritu ay hindi makikipagpunyagi sa tao magpakailan man, sapagka't siya ma'y laman: gayon ma'y magiging isang daan at dalawang pung taon ang kaniyang mga araw.

6.eng: There were giants in the earth in those days; and also after that, when the sons of God came in unto the daughters of men, and they bare children to them, the same became mighty men which were of old, men of renown.
6.tag: Ang mga higante ay nasa lupa ng mga araw na yaon, at pagkatapos din naman na makasiping ang mga anak ng Dios sa mga anak na babae ng tao, at mangagkaanak sila sa kanila: ang mga ito rin ang naging makapangyarihan nang unang panahon na mga lalaking bantog.

6.eng: And GOD saw that the wickedness of man was great in the earth, and that every imagination of the thoughts of his heart was only evil continually.
6.tag: At nakita ng Panginoon na mabigat ang kasamaan ng tao sa lupa, at ang buong haka ng mga pagiisip ng kaniyang puso ay pawang masama lamang na parati.

6.eng: And it repented the LORD that he had made man on the earth, and it grieved him at his heart.
6.tag: At nagsisi ang Panginoon na kaniyang nilalang ang tao sa lupa, at nalumbay sa kaniyang puso.

6.eng: And the LORD said, I will destroy man whom I have created from the face of the earth; both man, and beast, and the creeping thing, and the fowls of the air; for it repenteth me that I have made them.
6.tag: At sinabi ng Panginoon, Lilipulin ko ang tao na aking nilalang sa ibabaw ng lupa; ang tao at gayon din ang hayop, at ang mga umuusad at ang mga ibon sa himpapawid; sapagka't pinagsisisihan ko na aking nilalang sila.

6.eng: But Noah found grace in the eyes of the LORD.
6.tag: Datapuwa't si Noe ay nakasumpong ng biyaya sa mga mata ng Panginoon.

6.eng: These are the generations of Noah: Noah was a just man and perfect in his generations, and Noah walked with God.
6.tag: Ito ang mga lahi ni Noe. Si Noe ay lalaking matuwid at sakdal noong kapanahunan niya: si Noe ay lumalakad na kasama ng Dios.

6.eng: And Noah begat three sons, Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
6.tag: At nagkaanak si Noe ng tatlong lalake: si Sem, si Cham, at si Japhet.

6.eng: The earth also was corrupt before God, and the earth was filled with violence.
6.tag: At sumama ang lupa sa harap ng Dios, at ang lupa ay napuno ng karahasan.

6.eng: And God looked upon the earth, and, behold, it was corrupt; for all flesh had corrupted his way upon the earth.
6.tag: At tiningnan ng Dios ang lupa, at, narito sumama; sapagka't pinasama ng lahat ng tao ang kanilang paglakad sa ibabaw ng lupa.

6.eng: And God said unto Noah, The end of all flesh is come before me; for the earth is filled with violence through them; and, behold, I will destroy them with the earth.
6.tag: At sinabi ng Dios kay Noe, Ang wakas ng lahat ng tao ay dumating sa harap ko; sapagka't ang lupa ay napuno ng karahasan dahil sa kanila; at, narito, sila'y aking lilipuling kalakip ng lupa.

6.eng: Make thee an ark of gopher wood; rooms shalt thou make in the ark, and shalt pitch it within and without with pitch.
6.tag: Gumawa ka ng isang sasakyang kahoy na gofer; gagawa ka ng mga silid sa sasakyan, at iyong sisiksikan sa loob at sa labas ng sahing.

6.eng: And this is the fashion which thou shalt make it of : The length of the ark shall be three hundred cubits, the breadth of it fifty cubits, and the height of it thirty cubits.
6.tag: At ganitong paraan gagawin mo: tatlong daang siko ang haba ng sasakyan, limang pung siko ang luwang, at tatlong pung siko ang taas.

6.eng: A window shalt thou make to the ark, and in a cubit shalt thou finish it above; and the door of the ark shalt thou set in the side thereof; with lower, second, and third stories shalt thou make it.
6.tag: Gagawa ka ng isang durungawan sa sasakyan; at wawakasan mo ng isang siko sa dakong itaas; at ang pintuan ng sasakyan ay ilalagay mo sa tagiliran; gagawin mong may lapag na lalong mababa, pangalawa at pangatlo.

6.eng: And, behold, I, even I, do bring a flood of waters upon the earth, to destroy all flesh, wherein is the breath of life, from under heaven; and every thing that is in the earth shall die.
6.tag: At ako, narito, ako'y magpapadagsa ng isang baha ng tubig sa ibabaw ng lupa, upang lipulin sa silong ng langit ang lahat ng laman na may hininga ng buhay; ang lahat na nasa lupa ay mangamamatay.

6.eng: But with thee will I establish my covenant; and thou shalt come into the ark, thou, and thy sons, and thy wife, and thy sons' wives with thee.
6.tag: Datapuwa't pagtitibayin ko ang aking tipan sa iyo; at ikaw ay lululan sa sasakyan, ikaw, at ang iyong mga anak na lalake, at ang iyong asawa, at ang mga asawa ng iyong mga anak na kasama mo.

6.eng: And of every living thing of all flesh, two of every sort shalt thou bring into the ark, to keep them alive with thee; they shall be male and female.
6.tag: At sa bawa't nangabubuhay, sa lahat ng laman ay maglululan ka sa loob ng sasakyan ng dalawa sa bawa't uri upang maingatan silang buhay, na kasama mo; lalake at babae ang kinakailangan.

6.eng: Of fowls after their kind, and of cattle after their kind, of every creeping thing of the earth after his kind, two of every sort shall come unto thee, to keep them alive.
6.tag: Sa mga ibon ayon sa kanikanilang uri, at sa mga hayop ayon sa kanikanilang uri, sa bawa't nagsisiusad, ayon sa kanikanilang uri, dalawa sa bawa't uri, ay isasama mo sa iyo, upang maingatan silang buhay.

6.eng: And take thou unto thee of all food that is eaten, and thou shalt gather it to thee; and it shall be for food for thee, and for them.
6.tag: At magbaon ka ng lahat na pagkain na kinakain, at imbakin mo sa iyo; at magiging pagkain mo at nila.

6.eng: Thus did Noah; according to all that God commanded him, so did he.
6.tag: Gayon ginawa ni Noe; ayon sa lahat na iniutos sa kaniya ng Dios, ay gayon ang ginawa niya.

7.eng: And the LORD said unto Noah, Come thou and all thy house into the ark; for thee have I seen righteous before me in this generation.
7.tag: At sinabi ng Panginoon kay Noe, Lumulan ka at ang iyong buong sangbahayan sa sasakyan; sapagka't ikaw ay aking nakitang matuwid sa harap ko sa panahong ito.

7.eng: Of every clean beast thou shalt take to thee by sevens, the male and his female: and of beasts that are not clean by two, the male and his female.
7.tag: Sa bawa't malinis na hayop ay kukuha ka ng tigpipito, ng lalake at ng kaniyang babae; at sa mga hayop na hindi malinis ay dalawa, ng lalake at ng kaniyang babae;

7.eng: Of fowls also of the air by sevens, the male and the female; to keep seed alive upon the face of all the earth.
7.tag: Gayon din naman sa mga ibon sa himpapawid tigpipito, ng lalake at ng babae; upang ingatang binhing buhay sa ibabaw ng buong lupa.

7.eng: For yet seven days, and I will cause it to rain upon the earth forty days and forty nights; and every living substance that I have made will I destroy from off the face of the earth.
7.tag: Sapagka't pitong araw pa, at pauulanan ko na ang ibabaw ng lupa ng apat na pung araw at apat na pung gabi, at aking lilipulin ang lahat ng may buhay na aking nilikha sa balat ng lupa.

7.eng: And Noah did according unto all that the LORD commanded him.
7.tag: At ginawa ni Noe ayon sa lahat na iniutos sa kaniya ng Panginoon.

7.eng: And Noah was six hundred years old when the flood of waters was upon the earth.
7.tag: At may anim na raang taon si Noe nang ang baha ng tubig ay dumagsa sa ibabaw ng lupa.

7.eng: And Noah went in, and his sons, and his wife, and his sons' wives with him, into the ark, because of the waters of the flood.
7.tag: At lumulan sa sasakyan si Noe at ang kaniyang mga anak, at ang kaniyang asawa, at ang mga asawa ng kaniyang mga anak, dahil sa tubig ng baha.

7.eng: Of clean beasts, and of beasts that are not clean, and of fowls, and of every thing that creepeth upon the earth,
7.tag: Sa mga hayop na malinis, at sa mga hayop na hindi malinis, at sa mga ibon at sa bawa't umuusad sa ibabaw ng lupa,

7.eng: There went in two and two unto Noah into the ark, the male and the female, as God had commanded Noah.
7.tag: Ay dalawa't dalawang dumating kay Noe sa sasakyan, na lalake at babae ayon sa iniutos ng Dios kay Noe.

7.eng: And it came to pass after seven days, that the waters of the flood were upon the earth.
7.tag: At nangyari na pagkaraan ng pitong araw, na ang tubig ng baha ay umapaw sa ibabaw ng lupa.

7.eng: In the six hundredth year of Noah's life, in the second month, the seventeenth day of the month, the same day were all the fountains of the great deep broken up, and the windows of heaven were opened.
7.tag: Sa ikaanim na raang taon ng buhay ni Noe, nang ikalawang buwan, sa ikalabing pitong araw ng buwan, nang araw ding yaon, ay nangasira ang lahat ng bukal ng lubhang kalaliman, at ang mga durungawan ng langit ay nabuksan.

7.eng: And the rain was upon the earth forty days and forty nights.
7.tag: At umulan sa ibabaw ng lupa ng apat na pung araw at apat na pung gabi.

7.eng: In the selfsame day entered Noah, and Shem, and Ham, and Japheth, the sons of Noah, and Noah's wife, and the three wives of his sons with them, into the ark;
7.tag: Nang araw ding yaon, ay lumulan sa sasakyan si Noe, at si Sem, at si Cham, at si Japhet, na mga anak ni Noe, at ang asawa ni Noe, at ang tatlong asawa ng kaniyang mga anak na kasama nila;

7.eng: They, and every beast after his kind, and all the cattle after their kind, and every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth after his kind, and every fowl after his kind, every bird of every sort.
7.tag: Sila, at ang bawa't hayop gubat ayon sa kanikanilang uri, at lahat ng hayop na maamo ayon sa kanikanilang uri, at bawa't umuusad sa ibabaw ng lupa ayon sa kanikanilang uri, at bawa't ibon ayon sa kanikanilang uri, lahat ng sarisaring ibon.

7.eng: And they went in unto Noah into the ark, two and two of all flesh, wherein is the breath of life.
7.tag: At nagsidating kay Noe sa sasakyan na dalawa't dalawa, ang lahat ng hayop na may hinga ng buhay.

7.eng: And they that went in, went in male and female of all flesh, as God had commanded him: and the LORD shut him in.
7.tag: At ang mga nagsilulan, ay lumulang lalake at babae, ng lahat na laman, gaya ng iniutos sa kaniya ng Dios: at kinulong siya ng Panginoon.

7.eng: And the flood was forty days upon the earth; and the waters increased, and bare up the ark, and it was lift up above the earth.
7.tag: At tumagal ang baha ng apat na pung araw sa ibabaw ng lupa; at lumaki ang tubig at lumutang ang sasakyan, at nataas sa ibabaw ng lupa.

7.eng: And the waters prevailed, and were increased greatly upon the earth; and the ark went upon the face of the waters.
7.tag: At dumagsa ang tubig at lumaking mainam sa ibabaw ng lupa; at lumutang ang sasakyan sa ibabaw ng tubig.

7.eng: And the waters prevailed exceedingly upon the earth; and all the high hills, that were under the whole heaven, were covered.
7.tag: At dumagsang lubha ang tubig sa ibabaw ng lupa: at inapawan ang lahat na mataas na bundok na nasa silong ng buong langit.

7.eng: Fifteen cubits upward did the waters prevail; and the mountains were covered.
7.tag: Labing limang siko ang lalim na idinagsa ng tubig; at inapawan ang mga bundok.

7.eng: And all flesh died that moved upon the earth, both of fowl, and of cattle, and of beast, and of every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth, and every man:
7.tag: At namatay ang lahat ng lamang gumagalaw sa ibabaw ng lupa, ang mga ibon at gayon din ang hayop, at ang hayop gubat, at ang bawa't nagsisiusad na umuusad sa ibabaw ng lupa, at ang bawa't tao.

7.eng: All in whose nostrils was the breath of life, of all that was in the dry land , died.
7.tag: Ang bawa't may hinga ng diwa ng buhay sa kanilang ilong, lahat na nasa lupang tuyo ay namatay.

7.eng: And every living substance was destroyed which was upon the face of the ground, both man, and cattle, and the creeping things, and the fowl of the heaven; and they were destroyed from the earth: and Noah only remained alive , and they that were with him in the ark.
7.tag: At nilipol ang bawa't may buhay na nasa ibabaw ng lupa, ang tao at gayon din ang hayop, at ang mga umuusad at ang mga ibon sa himpapawid; at sila'y nalipol sa lupa: at ang natira lamang, ay si Noe at ang mga kasama niya sa sasakyan.

7.eng: And the waters prevailed upon the earth an hundred and fifty days.
7.tag: At tumagal ang tubig sa ibabaw ng lupa, ng isang daan at limang pung araw.

8.eng: And God remembered Noah, and every living thing, and all the cattle that was with him in the ark: and God made a wind to pass over the earth, and the waters asswaged;
8.tag: At naalaala ng Dios si Noe, at ang lahat ng may buhay, at ang lahat ng hayop na kasama niya sa sasakyan: at nagpahihip ang Dios ng isang hangin sa ibabaw ng lupa, at humupa ang tubig;

8.eng: The fountains also of the deep and the windows of heaven were stopped, and the rain from heaven was restrained;
8.tag: Natakpan din ang mga bukal ng kalaliman at ang mga dungawan ng langit, at napigil ang ulan sa langit;

8.eng: And the waters returned from off the earth continually: and after the end of the hundred and fifty days the waters were abated.
8.tag: At humupang patuloy ang tubig sa lupa; at kumati ang tubig pagkaraan ng isang daan at limang pung araw.

8.eng: And the ark rested in the seventh month, on the seventeenth day of the month, upon the mountains of Ararat.
8.tag: At sumadsad ang sasakyan nang ikapitong buwan, nang ikalabing pitong araw ng buwan, sa ibabaw ng mga bundok ng Ararat.

8.eng: And the waters decreased continually until the tenth month: in the tenth month , on the first day of the month, were the tops of the mountains seen.
8.tag: At ang tubig ay nagpatuloy ng paghupa hanggang sa ikasangpung buwan: nang ikasangpung buwan, nang unang araw ng buwan, ay nakita ang mga taluktok ng mga bundok.

8.eng: And it came to pass at the end of forty days, that Noah opened the window of the ark which he had made:
8.tag: At nangyari, pagkaraan ng apat na pung araw, na binuksan ni Noe ang dungawan ng sasakyan na kaniyang ginawa:

8.eng: And he sent forth a raven, which went forth to and fro, until the waters were dried up from off the earth.
8.tag: At siya'y nagpalipad ng isang uwak, at ito'y nagparoo't parito hanggang sa natuyo ang tubig sa lupa.

8.eng: Also he sent forth a dove from him, to see if the waters were abated from off the face of the ground;
8.tag: At nagpalipad siya ng isang kalapati, upang tingnan kung humupa na ang tubig sa ibabaw ng lupa.

8.eng: But the dove found no rest for the sole of her foot, and she returned unto him into the ark, for the waters were on the face of the whole earth: then he put forth his hand, and took her, and pulled her in unto him into the ark.
8.tag: Datapuwa't hindi nakasumpong ang kalapati ng madapuan ng talampakan ng kaniyang paa, at nagbalik sa kaniya sa sasakyan, sapagka't ang tubig ay nangasa ibabaw pa ng buong lupa: at iniunat ang kaniyang kamay at hinawakan, at ipinasok niya sa sasakyan.

8.eng: And he stayed yet other seven days; and again he sent forth the dove out of the ark;
8.tag: At naghintay pa ng muling pitong araw; at muling pinalipad ang kalapati sa labas ng sasakyan;

8.eng: And the dove came in to him in the evening; and, lo, in her mouth was an olive leaf pluckt off: so Noah knew that the waters were abated from off the earth.
8.tag: At ang kalapati ay nagbalik sa kaniya ng dakong hapon; at, narito't may dalang isang dahong sariwa ng olivo sa tuka: sa gayon ay naunawa ni Noe na humupa na ang tubig sa lupa.

8.eng: And he stayed yet other seven days; and sent forth the dove; which returned not again unto him any more.
8.tag: At naghintay pang muli siya ng pitong araw; at pinalipad ang kalapati; at hindi na muling nagbalik pa sa kaniya.

8.eng: And it came to pass in the six hundredth and first year, in the first month , the first day of the month, the waters were dried up from off the earth: and Noah removed the covering of the ark, and looked, and, behold, the face of the ground was dry.
8.tag: At nangyari, nang taong ikaanim na raan at isa, nang unang buwan, nang unang araw ng buwan, ay natuyo ang tubig sa ibabaw ng lupa: at inalis ni Noe ang takip ng sasakyan at tumanaw siya, at, narito't ang ibabaw ng lupa ay tuyo.

8.eng: And in the second month, on the seven and twentieth day of the month, was the earth dried.
8.tag: At nang ikalawang buwan nang ikadalawang pu't pitong araw ng buwan, ay natuyo ang lupa.

8.eng: And God spake unto Noah, saying,
8.tag: At nagsalita ang Dios kay Noe, na sinasabi,

8.eng: Go forth of the ark, thou, and thy wife, and thy sons, and thy sons' wives with thee.
8.tag: Lumunsad ka sa sasakyan, ikaw at ang iyong asawa, at ang iyong mga anak, at ang mga asawa ng iyong mga anak na kasama mo.

8.eng: Bring forth with thee every living thing that is with thee, of all flesh, both of fowl, and of cattle, and of every creeping thing that creepeth upon the earth; that they may breed abundantly in the earth, and be fruitful, and multiply upon the earth.
8.tag: Ilabas mong kasama mo ang bawa't may buhay na kasama mo sa lahat ng laman, ang mga ibon, at ang mga hayop, at ang bawa't nagsisiusad na umuusad sa ibabaw ng lupa; upang magsipanganak ng sagana sa lupa, at magpalaanakin, at mangagsidami sa ibabaw ng lupa.

8.eng: And Noah went forth, and his sons, and his wife, and his sons' wives with him:
8.tag: At lumunsad si Noe, at ang kaniyang mga anak, at ang kaniyang asawa, at ang mga asawa ng kaniyang mga anak na kasama niya:

8.eng: Every beast, every creeping thing, and every fowl, and whatsoever creepeth upon the earth, after their kinds, went forth out of the ark.
8.tag: Ang bawa't hayop, bawa't umuusad, at bawa't ibon, anomang gumagalaw sa ibabaw ng lupa ayon sa kanikaniyang angkan ay nangagsilunsad sa sasakyan.

8.eng: And Noah builded an altar unto the LORD; and took of every clean beast, and of every clean fowl, and offered burnt offerings on the altar.
8.tag: At ipinagtayo ni Noe ng isang dambana ang Panginoon; at kumuha sa lahat na malinis na hayop, at sa lahat na malinis na ibon, at nagalay ng mga handog na susunugin sa ibabaw ng dambana.

8.eng: And the LORD smelled a sweet savour; and the LORD said in his heart, I will not again curse the ground any more for man's sake; for the imagination of man's heart is evil from his youth; neither will I again smite any more every thing living, as I have done.
8.tag: At sinamyo ng Panginoon ang masarap na amoy; at nagsabi ang Panginoon sa sarili, Hindi ko na muling susumpain ang lupa, dahil sa tao, sapagka't ang haka ng puso ng tao ay masama mula sa kaniyang pagkabata; ni hindi ko na muling lilipulin pa ang lahat na nabubuhay na gaya ng aking ginawa.

8.eng: While the earth remaineth, seedtime and harvest, and cold and heat, and summer and winter, and day and night shall not cease.
8.tag: Samantalang ang lupa ay lumalagi, ay hindi maglilikat ang paghahasik at pagaani, at ang lamig at init, at ang tagaraw at taginaw, at ang araw at gabi.

9.eng: And God blessed Noah and his sons, and said unto them, Be fruitful, and multiply, and replenish the earth.
9.tag: At binasbasan ng Dios si Noe at ang kaniyang mga anak, at sa kanila'y sinabi, Kayo'y magpalaanakin, at magpakarami at inyong kalatan ang lupa.

9.eng: And the fear of you and the dread of you shall be upon every beast of the earth, and upon every fowl of the air, upon all that moveth upon the earth, and upon all the fishes of the sea; into your hand are they delivered.
9.tag: At ang takot sa inyo at sindak sa inyo ay mapapasa bawa't hayop sa lupa, at sa bawa't ibon sa himpapawid; lahat ng umuusad sa lupa, at lahat ng isda sa dagat, ay ibinibigay sa inyong kamay.

9.eng: Every moving thing that liveth shall be meat for you; even as the green herb have I given you all things.
9.tag: Bawa't gumagalaw na nabubuhay ay magiging pagkain ninyo; gaya ng mga sariwang pananim na lahat ay ibinibigay ko sa inyo.

9.eng: But flesh with the life thereof, which is the blood thereof, shall ye not eat.
9.tag: Nguni't ang lamang may buhay, na siya niyang dugo, ay huwag ninyong kakanin.

9.eng: And surely your blood of your lives will I require; at the hand of every beast will I require it, and at the hand of man; at the hand of every man's brother will I require the life of man.
9.tag: At tunay na hihingan ko ng sulit ang inyong dugo, ang dugo ng inyong mga buhay: sa kamay ng bawa't ganid ay hihingan ko ng sulit; at sa kamay ng tao, sa kamay ng bawa't kapatid ng tao ay hihingan ko ng sulit ang buhay ng tao.

9.eng: Whoso sheddeth man's blood, by man shall his blood be shed: for in the image of God made he man.
9.tag: Ang magbubo ng dugo ng tao, sa pamamagitan ng tao ay mabububo ang kaniyang dugo: sapagka't sa larawan ng Dios nilalang ang tao.

9.eng: And you, be ye fruitful, and multiply; bring forth abundantly in the earth, and multiply therein.
9.tag: At kayo'y magpalaanakin at magpakarami; magsilago kayo ng sagana sa lupa, at kayo'y magsidami riyan.

9.eng: And God spake unto Noah, and to his sons with him, saying,
9.tag: At nagsalita ang Dios kay Noe, at sa kaniyang mga anak na kasama niya, na sinasabi,

9.eng: And I, behold, I establish my covenant with you, and with your seed after you;
9.tag: At ako, narito, aking pinagtitibay ang aking tipan sa inyo, at sa inyong binhi na susunod sa inyo;

9.eng: And with every living creature that is with you, of the fowl, of the cattle, and of every beast of the earth with you; from all that go out of the ark, to every beast of the earth.
9.tag: At sa bawa't nilikhang may buhay na kasama ninyo, ang mga ibon, ang hayop at bawa't ganid sa lupa na kasama ninyo; sa lahat ng lumunsad sa sasakyan pati sa bawa't ganid sa lupa.

9.eng: And I will establish my covenant with you; neither shall all flesh be cut off any more by the waters of a flood; neither shall there any more be a flood to destroy the earth.
9.tag: At aking pagtitibayin ang aking tipan sa inyo; ni hindi ko na lilipulin ang lahat ng laman sa pamamagitan ng tubig ng baha; ni hindi na magkakaroon pa ng bahang gigiba ng lupa.

9.eng: And God said, This is the token of the covenant which I make between me and you and every living creature that is with you, for perpetual generations:
9.tag: At sinabi ng Dios, Ito ang tanda ng tipang ginawa ko sa inyo, at sa bawa't kinapal na may buhay na kasama ninyo sa buong panahon:

9.eng: I do set my bow in the cloud, and it shall be for a token of a covenant between me and the earth.
9.tag: Ang aking bahaghari ay inilalagay ko sa alapaap, at siyang magiging tanda ng tipan ko at ng lupa.

9.eng: And it shall come to pass, when I bring a cloud over the earth, that the bow shall be seen in the cloud:
9.tag: At mangyayari, pagka ako'y magbababa ng isang alapaap sa ibabaw ng lupa, na makikita ang bahaghari sa alapaap.

9.eng: And I will remember my covenant, which is between me and you and every living creature of all flesh; and the waters shall no more become a flood to destroy all flesh.
9.tag: At aalalahanin ko ang aking tipan, na inilagda ko sa akin at sa inyo, at sa bawa't kinapal na may buhay sa lahat ng laman; at ang tubig ay hindi na magiging bahang lilipol ng lahat ng laman.

9.eng: And the bow shall be in the cloud; and I will look upon it, that I may remember the everlasting covenant between God and every living creature of all flesh that is upon the earth.
9.tag: At ang bahaghari ay pasa sa alapaap, at aking mamasdan, upang aking maalaala, ang walang hanggang tipan ng Dios at ng bawa't kinapal na may buhay sa lahat ng lamang nasa ibabaw ng lupa.

9.eng: And God said unto Noah, This is the token of the covenant, which I have established between me and all flesh that is upon the earth.
9.tag: At sinabi ng Dios kay Noe, Ito ang tanda ng tipang inilagda ko sa akin at sa lahat ng laman na nasa ibabaw ng lupa.

9.eng: And the sons of Noah, that went forth of the ark, were Shem, and Ham, and Japheth: and Ham is the father of Canaan.
9.tag: At ang mga anak ni Noe na nagsilunsad sa sasakyan ay si Sem, at si Cham at si Japhet: at si Cham ay siyang ama ni Canaan.

9.eng: These are the three sons of Noah: and of them was the whole earth overspread.
9.tag: Ang tatlong ito ay mga anak ni Noe: at sa mga ito'y nakalatan ang buong lupa.

9.eng: And Noah began to be an husbandman, and he planted a vineyard:
9.tag: At nagpasimula si Noe na maging mangbubukid, at naglagay ng isang ubasan.

9.eng: And he drank of the wine, and was drunken; and he was uncovered within his tent.
9.tag: At uminom ng alak at nalango; at siya'y nahubaran sa loob ng kaniyang tolda.

9.eng: And Ham, the father of Canaan, saw the nakedness of his father, and told his two brethren without.
9.tag: At si Cham na ama ni Canaan ay nakakita ng kahubaran ng kaniyang ama, at isinaysay sa kaniyang dalawang kapatid na nangasa labas.

9.eng: And Shem and Japheth took a garment, and laid it upon both their shoulders, and went backward, and covered the nakedness of their father; and their faces were backward, and they saw not their father's nakedness.
9.tag: At kumuha si Sem at si Japhet ng isang balabal, at isinabalikat nilang dalawa, at lumakad ng paurong, at tinakpan ang kahubaran ng kanilang ama; at ang mukha nila ay patalikod, at hindi nila nakita ang kahubaran ng kanilang ama.

9.eng: And Noah awoke from his wine, and knew what his younger son had done unto him.
9.tag: At nagising si Noe sa kaniyang pagkalango sa alak, at naalaman ang ginawa sa kaniya ng kaniyang bunsong anak.

9.eng: And he said, Cursed be Canaan; a servant of servants shall he be unto his brethren.
9.tag: At sinabi, Sumpain si Canaan! Siya'y magiging alipin ng mga alipin sa kaniyang mga kapatid.

9.eng: And he said, Blessed be the LORD God of Shem; and Canaan shall be his servant.
9.tag: At sinabi niya, Purihin ang Panginoon, ang Dios ni Sem! At si Canaan ay maging alipin niya.

9.eng: God shall enlarge Japheth, and he shall dwell in the tents of Shem; and Canaan shall be his servant.
9.tag: Pakapalin ng Dios si Japhet. At matira siya sa mga tolda ni Sem; At si Canaan ay maging alipin niya.

9.eng: And Noah lived after the flood three hundred and fifty years.
9.tag: At nabuhay si Noe pagkaraan ng bahang gumunaw, ng tatlong daan at limang pung taon.

9.eng: And all the days of Noah were nine hundred and fifty years: and he died.
9.tag: At ang lahat ng naging araw ni Noe ay siyam na raan at limang pung taon: at namatay.

10.eng: Now these are the generations of the sons of Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth: and unto them were sons born after the flood.
10.tag: Ito nga ang sali't saling lahi ng mga anak ni Noe: si Sem, si Cham, at si Japhet: at sila'y nangagkaanak pagkaraan ng bahang gumunaw.

10.eng: The sons of Japheth; Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.
10.tag: Ang mga anak ni Japhet; si Gomer, at si Magog, at si Madai, at si Javan, at si Tubal, at si Meshech, at si Tiras.

10.eng: And the sons of Gomer; Ashkenaz, and Riphath, and Togarmah.
10.tag: At ang mga anak ni Gomer: si Azkenaz, at si Rifat, at si Togarma.

10.eng: And the sons of Javan; Elishah, and Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.
10.tag: At ang mga anak ni Javan; si Elisa, at si Tarsis, si Cittim, at si Dodanim.

10.eng: By these were the isles of the Gentiles divided in their lands; every one after his tongue, after their families, in their nations.
10.tag: Sa mga ito nangabahagi ang mga pulo ng mga bansa, sa kanilang mga lupain, na bawa't isa'y ayon sa kanikaniyang wika; ayon sa kanikanilang angkan, sa kanikanilang bansa.

10.eng: And the sons of Ham; Cush, and Mizraim, and Phut, and Canaan.
10.tag: At ang mga anak ni Cham; si Cush, at si Mizraim, at si Phut, at si Canaan.

10.eng: And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabtah, and Raamah, and Sabtecha: and the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.
10.tag: At ang mga anak ni Cush; si Seba, at si Havila, at si Sabta, at si Raama, at si Sabtech: at ang mga anak ni Raama; si Sheba, at si Dedan.

10.eng: And Cush begat Nimrod: he began to be a mighty one in the earth.
10.tag: At naging anak ni Cush si Nimrod: siyang napasimulang maging makapangyarihan sa lupa.

10.eng: He was a mighty hunter before the LORD: wherefore it is said, Even as Nimrod the mighty hunter before the LORD.
10.tag: Siya'y makapangyarihang mangangaso sa harap ng Panginoon kaya't karaniwang sabihin: Gaya ni Nimrod, na makapangyarihang mangangaso sa harap ng Panginoon.

10.eng: And the beginning of his kingdom was Babel, and Erech, and Accad, and Calneh, in the land of Shinar.
10.tag: At ang pinagsimulan ng kaniyang kaharian ay ang Babel, at ang Erech, at ang Accad, at ang Calneh, sa lupain ng Shinar.

10.eng: Out of that land went forth Asshur, and builded Nineveh, and the city Rehoboth, and Calah,
10.tag: Buhat sa lupaing yaon ay napasa Asiria at itinayo ang Ninive, at ang Rehobotir, at ang Calah,

10.eng: And Resen between Nineveh and Calah: the same is a great city.
10.tag: At ang Ressen, sa pagitan ng Ninive at ng Calah (na siyang malaking bayan).

10.eng: And Mizraim begat Ludim, and Anamim, and Lehabim, and Naphtuhim,
10.tag: At naging anak ni Mizraim si Ludim, at si Anamim, at si Lehabim, at si Naphtuhim.

10.eng: And Pathrusim, and Casluhim, (out of whom came Philistim,) and Caphtorim.
10.tag: At si Pathrusim, at si Casluim (na siyang pinagbuhatan ng mga Filisteo), at ang Caphtorim.

10.eng: And Canaan begat Sidon his firstborn, and Heth,
10.tag: At naging anak ni Canaan si Sidon, na kaniyang panganay, at si Heth.

10.eng: And the Jebusite, and the Amorite, and the Girgasite,
10.tag: At ang Jebuseo, at ang Amorrheo, at ang Gergeseo;

10.eng: And the Hivite, and the Arkite, and the Sinite,
10.tag: At ang Heveo, at ang Araceo, at ang Sineo.

10.eng: And the Arvadite, and the Zemarite, and the Hamathite: and afterward were the families of the Canaanites spread abroad.
10.tag: At ang Aradio, at ang Samareo at ang Amatheo: at pagkatapos ay kumalat ang mga angkan ng Cananeo.

10.eng: And the border of the Canaanites was from Sidon, as thou comest to Gerar, unto Gaza; as thou goest, unto Sodom, and Gomorrah, and Admah, and Zeboim, even unto Lasha.
10.tag: At ang hangganan ng Cananeo ay mula sa Sidon, kung patungo sa Gerar, hanggang sa Gaza; kung patungo sa Sodoma at Gomorra, at Adma, at Zeboim hanggang Lasa.

10.eng: These are the sons of Ham, after their families, after their tongues, in their countries, and in their nations.
10.tag: Ito ang mga anak ni Cham, ayon sa kanikanilang angkan, ayon sa kanikanilang wika, sa kanikanilang mga lupain, sa kanilang mga bansa.

10.eng: Unto Shem also, the father of all the children of Eber, the brother of Japheth the elder, even to him were children born.
10.tag: At nagkaroon din naman ng mga anak si Sem, na ama ng lahat ng mga anak ni Heber, na siya ring lalong matandang kapatid ni Japhet.

10.eng: The children of Shem; Elam, and Asshur, and Arphaxad, and Lud, and Aram.
10.tag: Ang mga anak ni Sem; si Elam, at si Assur, at si Arphaxad, at si Lud, at si Aram.

10.eng: And the children of Aram; Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Mash.
10.tag: At ang mga anak ni Aram: si Uz, at si Hul, at si Gether, at si Mas.

10.eng: And Arphaxad begat Salah; and Salah begat Eber.
10.tag: At naging anak ni Arphaxad si Sala; at naging anak ni Sala si Heber.

10.eng: And unto Eber were born two sons: the name of one was Peleg; for in his days was the earth divided; and his brother's name was Joktan.
10.tag: At nagkaanak si Heber ng dalawang lalake; ang pangalan ng una'y Peleg; sapagka't sa mga araw niya'y nahati ang lupa; at ang pangalan ng kaniyang kapatid ay Joctan.

10.eng: And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,
10.tag: At naging anak ni Joctan si Almodad, at si Sheleph, at si Hazarmavet, at si Jerah;

10.eng: And Hadoram, and Uzal, and Diklah,
10.tag: At si Hadoram, at si Uzal, at si Dicla.

10.eng: And Obal, and Abimael, and Sheba,
10.tag: At si Obal, at si Abimael, at si Sheba.

10.eng: And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab: all these were the sons of Joktan.
10.tag: At si Ophir, at si Havila, at si Jobad: lahat ng ito ay mga naging anak ni Joctan.

10.eng: And their dwelling was from Mesha, as thou goest unto Sephar a mount of the east.
10.tag: At ang naging tahanan nila ay mula sa Mesa, kung patungo sa Sephar, na siyang bundok sa silanganan.

10.eng: These are the sons of Shem, after their families, after their tongues, in their lands, after their nations.
10.tag: Ito ang mga anak ni Sem, ayon sa kanikanilang angkan, ayon sa kanikanilang wika, sa kanikanilang lupain, ayon sa kanikanilang bansa.

10.eng: These are the families of the sons of Noah, after their generations, in their nations: and by these were the nations divided in the earth after the flood.
10.tag: Ito ang mga angkan ng mga anak ni Noe, ayon sa kanikanilang lahi, sa kanikanilang bansa: at sa mga ito nangabahagi ang mga bansa pagkatapos ng bahang gumunaw.

11.eng: And the whole earth was of one language, and of one speech.
11.tag: At ang buong lupa ay iisa ang wika at iisa ang salita.

11.eng: And it came to pass, as they journeyed from the east, that they found a plain in the land of Shinar; and they dwelt there.
11.tag: At nangyari, na, sa kanilang paglalakbay sa silanganan, ay nakasumpong sila ng isang kapatagan sa lupain ng Sinar; at sila'y nanahan doon.

11.eng: And they said one to another, Go to, let us make brick, and burn them throughly. And they had brick for stone, and slime had they for morter.
11.tag: At nagsangusapang, Halikayo! tayo'y gumawa ng mga laryo, at ating lutuing mabuti. At inari nilang bato ang laryo at ang betun ay inaring argamasa.

11.eng: And they said, Go to, let us build us a city and a tower, whose top may reach unto heaven; and let us make us a name, lest we be scattered abroad upon the face of the whole earth.
11.tag: At nagsipagsabi, Halikayo! Magtayo tayo ng isang bayan natin at ng isang moog, na ang taluktok niyaon ay aabot hanggang sa langit, at magtaglay tayo ng isang ngalan; baka tayo'y mangalat sa ibabaw ng buong lupa.

11.eng: And the LORD came down to see the city and the tower, which the children of men builded.
11.tag: At bumaba ang Panginoon upang tingnan ang bayan at ang moog, na itinayo ng mga anak ng mga tao.

11.eng: And the LORD said, Behold, the people is one, and they have all one language; and this they begin to do: and now nothing will be restrained from them, which they have imagined to do.
11.tag: At sinabi ng Panginoon, Narito, sila'y iisang bayan at silang lahat ay may isang wika; at ito ang kanilang pinasimulang gawin: at, ngayon nga'y walang makasasawata sa anomang kanilang balaking gawin.

11.eng: Go to, let us go down, and there confound their language, that they may not understand one another's speech.
11.tag: Halikayo! tayo'y bumaba at diyan din ay ating guluhin ang kanilang wika, na anopa't sila'y huwag magkatalastasan sa kanilang salita.

11.eng: So the LORD scattered them abroad from thence upon the face of all the earth: and they left off to build the city.
11.tag: Ganito pinanabog sila ng Panginoon mula riyan, sa ibabaw ng buong lupa; at kanilang iniwan ang pagtatayo ng bayan.

11.eng: Therefore is the name of it called Babel; because the LORD did there confound the language of all the earth: and from thence did the LORD scatter them abroad upon the face of all the earth.
11.tag: Kaya ang pangalang itinawag ay Babel; sapagka't doon ginulo ng Panginoon ang wika ng buong lupa: at mula roon ay pinanabog sila ng Panginoon sa ibabaw ng buong lupa.

11.eng: These are the generations of Shem: Shem was an hundred years old, and begat Arphaxad two years after the flood:
11.tag: Ito ang sali't saling lahi ni Sem. May isang daan taon si Sem at naging anak si Arphaxad, dalawang taon pagkatapos ng bahang gumunaw,

11.eng: And Shem lived after he begat Arphaxad five hundred years, and begat sons and daughters.
11.tag: At nabuhay si Sem, pagkatapos na maipanganak si Arphaxad, ng limang daang taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae.

11.eng: And Arphaxad lived five and thirty years, and begat Salah:
11.tag: At nabuhay si Arphaxad, ng tatlong pu't limang taon, at naging anak si Sala.

11.eng: And Arphaxad lived after he begat Salah four hundred and three years, and begat sons and daughters.
11.tag: At nabuhay si Arphaxad pagkatapos na maipanganak si Sala, ng apat na raan at tatlong taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae.

11.eng: And Salah lived thirty years, and begat Eber:
11.tag: At nabuhay si Sala ng tatlong pung taon, at naging anak si Heber:

11.eng: And Salah lived after he begat Eber four hundred and three years, and begat sons and daughters.
11.tag: At nabuhay si Sala pagkatapos na maipanganak si Heber, ng apat na raan at tatlong taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae.

11.eng: And Eber lived four and thirty years, and begat Peleg:
11.tag: At nabuhay si Heber ng tatlong pu't apat na taon, at naging anak si Peleg:

11.eng: And Eber lived after he begat Peleg four hundred and thirty years, and begat sons and daughters.
11.tag: At nabuhay si Heber pagkatapos na maipanganak si Peleg, ng apat na raan at tatlong pung taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae.

11.eng: And Peleg lived thirty years, and begat Reu:
11.tag: At nabuhay si Peleg ng tatlong pung taon, at naging anak si Reu:

11.eng: And Peleg lived after he begat Reu two hundred and nine years, and begat sons and daughters.
11.tag: At nabuhay si Peleg pagkatapos na maipanganak si Reu, ng dalawang daan at siyam na taon; at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae.

11.eng: And Reu lived two and thirty years, and begat Serug:
11.tag: At nabuhay si Reu ng tatlong pu't dalawang taon, at naging anak si Serug:

11.eng: And Reu lived after he begat Serug two hundred and seven years, and begat sons and daughters.
11.tag: At nabuhay si Reu pagkatapos na maipanganak si Serug, ng dalawang daan at pitong taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae.

11.eng: And Serug lived thirty years, and begat Nahor:
11.tag: At nabuhay si Serug ng tatlong pung taon, at naging anak si Nachor:

11.eng: And Serug lived after he begat Nahor two hundred years, and begat sons and daughters.
11.tag: At nabuhay si Serug pagkatapos maipanganak si Nachor, ng dalawang daang taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae.

11.eng: And Nahor lived nine and twenty years, and begat Terah:
11.tag: At nabuhay si Nachor ng dalawang pu't siyam na taon, at naging anak si Thare:

11.eng: And Nahor lived after he begat Terah an hundred and nineteen years, and begat sons and daughters.
11.tag: At nabuhay si Nachor pagkatapos na maipanganak si Thare, ng isang daan at labing siyam na taon, at nagkaanak ng mga lalake at mga babae.

11.eng: And Terah lived seventy years, and begat Abram, Nahor, and Haran.
11.tag: At nabuhay si Thare ng pitong pung taon, at naging anak si Abram, si Nachor at si Haran.

11.eng: Now these are the generations of Terah: Terah begat Abram, Nahor, and Haran; and Haran begat Lot.
11.tag: Ito nga ang mga lahi ni Thare. Naging anak ni Thare si Abram, si Nachor, at si Haran; at naging anak ni Haran si Lot.

11.eng: And Haran died before his father Terah in the land of his nativity, in Ur of the Chaldees.
11.tag: At namatay si Haran bago namatay ang kaniyang amang si Thare sa lupaing kaniyang tinubuan, sa Ur ng mga Caldeo.

11.eng: And Abram and Nahor took them wives: the name of Abram's wife was Sarai; and the name of Nahor's wife, Milcah, the daughter of Haran, the father of Milcah, and the father of Iscah.
11.tag: At nagsipagasawa si Abram at si Nachor: ang pangalan ng asawa ni Abram ay Sarai; at ang pangalan ng asawa ni Nachor, ay Milca, anak ni Haran, ama ni Milca at ama ni Iscah.

11.eng: But Sarai was barren; she had no child.
11.tag: At si Sarai ay baog; siya'y walang anak.

11.eng: And Terah took Abram his son, and Lot the son of Haran his son's son, and Sarai his daughter in law, his son Abram's wife; and they went forth with them from Ur of the Chaldees, to go into the land of Canaan; and they came unto Haran, and dwelt there.
11.tag: At ipinagsama ni Thare si Abram na kaniyang anak, at si Lot na anak ni Haran, na anak ng kaniyang anak, at si Sarai na kaniyang manugang, asawa ni Abram na kaniyang anak; at samasamang nagsialis sa Ur ng mga Caldeo upang magsipasok sa lupain ng Canaan, at nagsidating sila sa Haran, at nagsitahan doon.

11.eng: And the days of Terah were two hundred and five years: and Terah died in Haran.
11.tag: At ang mga naging araw ni Thare ay dalawang daan at limang taon: at namatay si Thare sa Haran.

12.eng: Now the LORD had said unto Abram, Get thee out of thy country, and from thy kindred, and from thy father's house, unto a land that I will shew thee:
12.tag: Sinabi nga ng Panginoon kay Abram, Umalis ka sa iyong lupain, at sa iyong mga kamaganak, at sa bahay ng iyong ama, na ikaw ay pasa lupaing ituturo ko sa iyo:

12.eng: And I will make of thee a great nation, and I will bless thee, and make thy name great; and thou shalt be a blessing:
12.tag: At gagawin kitang isang malaking bansa, at ikaw ay aking pagpapalain, at padadakilain ko ang iyong pangalan; at ikaw ay maging isang kapalaran:

12.eng: And I will bless them that bless thee, and curse him that curseth thee: and in thee shall all families of the earth be blessed.
12.tag: At pagpapalain ko ang mga magpapala sa iyo, at susumpain ko ang mga susumpa sa iyo: at pagpapalain sa iyo ang lahat ng angkan sa lupa.

12.eng: So Abram departed, as the LORD had spoken unto him; and Lot went with him: and Abram was seventy and five years old when he departed out of Haran.
12.tag: Kaya't yumaon si Abram, ayon sa sinalita sa kaniya ng Panginoon; at si Lot ay sumama sa kaniya: at si Abram ay may pitong pu't limang taon, nang umalis sa Haran.
